untranslatable_reason: Signal requires fundamental indicators (EPS rank, quarterly earnings growth, earnings deceleration) that are not available in the allowed price-action and technical indicator list. These are company earnings metrics that must be sourced from financial databases, not derived from OHLCV price data.
translation_notes: This signal is fundamentally based on earnings quality metrics and cannot be translated into technical indicators. It requires: (1) EPS rank scores from financial data providers, (2) historical earnings growth rates calculated from company fundamentals, and (3) earnings deceleration analysis. The allowed indicator set is limited to price-action, volatility, and momentum indicators which cannot replicate earnings-based screening. To implement this signal, integrate a fundamental data source and calculate eps_rank, earnings_growth_quarterly, and earnings_deceleration metrics separately from price data.
